notableEvents.label: Bryce Harper GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bryce Harper grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop Joey Ortiz to first baseman Andrew Vaughn. Kyle Schwarber out at 2nd. Bryce Harper out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Andrew Painter. Garrett Mitchell scores.

notableEvents.label: Sal Frelick pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sal Frelick singles on a fly ball to right fielder Gabriel Rincones Jr.
